evidence_summary: Establish the magical guide through a formal greeting and pivot the narrative from immediate arrival confusion to the broader political threat of the Wicked Witch of the West.
The Witch of the North arrives to greet Dorothy. She explains that while one witch is dead, another (the Wicked Witch of the West) remains a threat.
Dorothy is weary and confused in a lush, colorful clearing.
Dorothy feels reassured but aware of the looming threat from the West.
witch_of_the_north arrives to provide guidance and political context.
